raw:
From: billing@amazon.com
To: john@company.com
Subject: Your Amazon Order Confirmation #112-3456789
Date: Mon, 15 Jan 2024 10:30:00 -0500
Message-ID: <abc123@amazon.com>
MIME-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8

Hello John,

Thank you for your order! Your payment of $234.56 has been processed.

Order Details:
- Ergonomic Keyboard: $89.99
- Monitor Stand: $144.57

Shipping to: 123 Main St, New York, NY 10001
Expected delivery: January 18, 2024

Thank you for shopping with Amazon.

From: noreply@chase.com
To: sarah@company.com
Subject: JPMorgan Chase - Wire Transfer Received
Date: Tue, 16 Jan 2024 14:22:00 -0500
Message-ID: <def456@chase.com>
MIME-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8

Dear Sarah,

A wire transfer of $15,000.00 has been credited to your account.

Sender: Goldman Sachs Group Inc
Reference: Q4-2024-ADV-FEE
Date: January 16, 2024

Your current balance: $52,340.89

Thank you for banking with JPMorgan Chase.

From: invoices@deloitte.com To: accounting@company.com Subject: Invoice #DLT-2024-0892 - Annual Audit Services Date: Fri, 19 Jan 2024 09:15:00 -0500 Message-ID: MIME-Version: 1.0 Content-Type: multipart/alternative; boundary="boundary123" --boundary123 Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8 Dear Accounts Payable, Please find attached invoice #DLT-2024-0892 for annual audit services. Amount Due: $25,000.00 Due Date: February 19, 2024 Payment to: Deloitte & Touche LLP Services rendered: - Financial statement audit (FY2023) - SOX compliance review - Internal controls assessment Please remit payment via bank transfer. --boundary123 Content-Type: text/html; charset=utf-8

Invoice #DLT-2024-0892

Amount: $25,000.00

--boundary123--

From: expensify@company.com
To: manager@company.com
Subject: Expense Report: Sarah Johnson - London Trip
Date: Wed, 24 Jan 2024 16:45:00 -0500
Message-ID: <jkl012@company.com>
MIME-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8

Expense Report Summary

Employee: Sarah Johnson
Trip: Client Meeting - London, UK
Dates: Jan 20-23, 2024

Expenses:
- Delta Airlines roundtrip flight: $1,245.80
- Hilton London Hotel (3 nights): $897.00
- Uber rides: $156.40
- Client dinner at The Ivy: $423.50

Total: $2,722.70

Approval requested from: Michael Chen, VP Finance

From: alerts@stripe.com
To: finance@company.com
Subject: Stripe Monthly Fee Summary - January 2024
Date: Thu, 01 Feb 2024 08:00:00 -0500
Message-ID: <mno345@stripe.com>
MIME-Version: 1.0
Content-Type: text/plain; charset=utf-8

Hi Finance Team,

Here is your Stripe processing summary for January 2024:

Total transactions processed: 1,247
Total volume: $89,432.10
Processing fees: $456.78
Net deposits: $88,975.32

Top merchants by volume:
1. Enterprise Client A: $34,500.00
2. SMB Client B: $22,100.00
3. Startup Client C: $15,800.00

Next payout date: February 3, 2024

Thank you for using Stripe.
